text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I can't wait until my next training<n>session.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You see, after I lost a race yesterday,<n>Sky was
kind enough to take me to a<n>park.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
While we were walking, I noticed all the<n>flowers at
our feet. The way they swayed<n>in the wind made it
look like they were<n>waving at us.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They really helped me cheer up, both<n>the flowers
and Sky. So now I'm feeling<n>up to working
towards a comeback!
